name: web
description: Unified web search and URL fetch with multi-provider fallback (Perplexity, Tavily, Firecrawl, httpx)

commands.verify: python -c "from tools.web import web_search_sync, fetch_sync; print('OK')"

config.fallback_order: First available provider succeeds; subsequent providers are tried on failure

workflows.name: web-search
workflows.description: Search the web with AI-summarized results

workflows.name: url-fetch
workflows.description: Fetch and clean content from a URL
